theme: Phần mềm kế toán & công cụ

vocab.example: I keep track of expenses in a spreadsheet.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi theo dõi chi phí trong một bảng tính.

vocab.example: We automated the monthly invoice process.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi đã tự động hóa quy trình lập hóa đơn hàng tháng.

vocab.example: The app didn't sync data with the server last night.
vocab.example_vi: Ứng dụng đã không đồng bộ dữ liệu với máy chủ tối qua.

vocab.example: I use a template to prepare the report faster.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi dùng mẫu có sẵn để chuẩn bị báo cáo nhanh hơn.

vocab.example: Can you export a report for the finance meeting?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể xuất báo cáo cho cuộc họp tài chính không?

vocab.example: There's a small glitch when I try to save the file.
vocab.example_vi: Có một lỗi nhỏ khi tôi cố lưu tệp.

vocab.example: Please set up my user access to the new system.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng cấp quyền truy cập hệ thống mới cho tôi.

vocab.example: We run a backup of the accounting data every night.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi sao lưu dữ liệu kế toán mỗi đêm.

listening.title: Fixing an issue with the accounting software

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Duc, can you help me? The accounting software keeps showing a glitch when I export a report.

lines.speaker: Duc
lines.text: Let me take a look. Are you trying to export a report to Excel?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes, I usually use a spreadsheet template for the monthly summary.

lines.speaker: Duc
lines.text: I see the issue. The system didn't sync data properly with the server last night.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Is there a way to automate that so it doesn't happen again?

lines.speaker: Duc
lines.text: Yes, we can automate the daily sync so it runs automatically every morning.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: That would save me a lot of time. Can you also check my user access?

lines.speaker: Duc
lines.text: Sure, I'll make sure your user access includes the reporting module.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Great. Also, do we have a backup of last month's data just in case?

lines.speaker: Duc
lines.text: Yes, the backup runs every night, so your data is safe.

questions.q: What problem does Hoa have with the software?
options: It shows a glitch when exporting a report
It won't let her log in

questions.q: What caused the issue, according to Duc?
options: The system didn't sync data properly

questions.q: How often does the backup run?

shadowing: Could you help me export a report from the software?
I usually use a spreadsheet template for the monthly summary.
We should automate the daily sync so it runs every morning.
Can you check that my user access includes the reporting module?
Make sure we have a backup of last month's data.
